reviews.comment:
Desayuno abundante, la atención es buena y rápida, la leche chocolatada para los chicos tenía mal sabor pero no la cobraron.

(Translated by Google)
The breakfast was plentiful, the service was good and fast, the chocolate milk for the children tasted bad but they didn't charge for it.

reviews.comment:
Hotel muy sencillo para dormir, para viajantes, seguir de largo al dia siguiente. Buena calefacción y buen aire acondicionado

(Translated by Google)
A very simple hotel for travelers to sleep in and continue the next day. Good heating and air conditioning.
